---
title: Review upstream changes since the pinned baseline and apply or re-pin
labels: phase:5, type:compat, agent:ok
milestone: Phase 5 — Parity audit + release
depends_on: p4-99-gate
---
## Goal

Before release, make sure we are not shipping a port of a stale tree:
review every upstream commit since the UPSTREAM.md pin
(`8158a97c10c37e577b0a6e2d3175d143918216cd`, 2026-06-06,
`agentation@3.0.2`), apply the changes that affect ported code using the
documented sync process, and decide whether to bump the pin for the first
release. This is the first real execution of the "Ongoing: upstream sync
process" from PLAN.md.

## Upstream reference

- The entire `upstream/package/src/` tree at the pin (23.4k lines incl.
  tests/styles) plus `upstream/mcp/` (used unchanged in Phase 4).
- Review command from UPSTREAM.md:
  `git -C upstream fetch origin && git -C upstream log 8158a97..origin/HEAD -- package/src mcp`.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The commit list since the pin is reviewed and summarized (what
      changed, what affects ported files, what is React-only noise) in the
      PR description — or in UPSTREAM.md if the pin is bumped.
- [ ] Changes touching verbatim/adapted-ported files are applied as direct
      diffs; changes touching rewritten components are re-implemented in
      the Svelte code; changes touching skipped files are recorded as
      no-ops in the summary.
- [ ] If the pin is bumped: UPSTREAM.md table (hash, date, version) and the
      affected PORTING.md rows are updated in the same PR; compat fixtures
      are regenerated by script from the new pin (never hand-edited).
- [ ] If the pin is kept: a one-line rationale is added to the PR
      (e.g. no npm release since 3.0.2, post-release commits are docs-only).
- [ ] Full test suite green, including the Phase 1 fixture-parity test and
      a re-run of the Phase 4 e2e loop against the (possibly updated)
      upstream MCP server.
- [ ] PLAN.md Phase 5 checkbox "Review upstream commits/releases since our
      pinned baseline; apply diffs" ticked.

## Out of scope

- Porting brand-new upstream features found in the diff that go beyond
  keeping ported files current — file separate issues in the right phase.
- Anything under `upstream/package/src/components/design-mode/` (Phase 6).
- Changes to the sync process itself (UPSTREAM.md already defines it).

## Notes

- UPSTREAM.md "Updating the baseline" is the binding 5-step process, and it
  requires this to be its own `type:compat` issue — never folded into
  feature work. This issue is that issue.
- RESEARCH.md: upstream has been quiet since 3.0.2 (2026-03-25) with only
  post-release docs/fix commits at the pin date, so expect a small diff —
  but verify, the repo had pushes in June 2026.
